# Pull Request Description

## Related Issue
Closes #

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI improvement
- [ ] Documentation update

## What Has Been Changed?
Describe the changes made.

## Implementation Details
Explain how the issue was solved.

## Screenshots
Add screenshots if applicable.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested properly
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Responsive UI maintained
